title: Infosys announces strategic collaboration with OpenAI for enterprise AI transformation
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with OpenAI to help enterprises transform software development and modernization using OpenAI frontier AI models and products including Codex. Infosys will combine OpenAI technology with Infosys Topaz Fabric to support practical, responsible deployment and measurable business outcomes. The collaboration initially focuses on software engineering, legacy modernization, DevOps automation, e-commerce, and other engineering-led domains, with the stated aim of improving engineering productivity, accelerating delivery, reducing time-to-market, and helping customers scale AI adoption beyond pilots.

key_facts.fact: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with OpenAI to help enterprises transform software development and modernization with OpenAI's frontier AI models and products like Codex.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Announces Strategic Collaboration with OpenAI to Accelerate Enterprise AI Transformation and Unlock AI Value at Scale

key_facts.fact: Infosys will combine OpenAI's technology with Infosys Topaz Fabric, described as its purpose-built, composable and open agentic services suite.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Announces Strategic Collaboration with OpenAI to Accelerate Enterprise AI Transformation and Unlock AI Value at Scale

key_facts.fact: The collaboration is intended to help customers move from AI experimentation to practical, responsible deployment and measurable business outcomes.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Announces Strategic Collaboration with OpenAI to Accelerate Enterprise AI Transformation and Unlock AI Value at Scale

key_facts.fact: The engagement spans high-impact industry and functional opportunities, with an early focus on software engineering, legacy modernization, DevOps automation, e-commerce, and other engineering-led domains.

key_facts.fact: The collaboration is designed to help organizations modernize development workflows, improve engineering productivity, accelerate delivery, and reduce time-to-market.

key_facts.fact: OpenAI stated that Infosys's expertise can help enterprises deploy Codex across legacy code modernization, code review automation, vulnerability detection, and application development.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in AI-first business consulting  and  technology  services,  today  announced  a  strategic  collaboration  with  OpenAI  to  help enterprises  transform  software  development  and  modernization  with  OpenAI's  frontier  AI  models  and products like Codex.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Announces Strategic Collaboration with OpenAI to Accelerate Enterprise AI Transformation and Unlock AI Value at Scale
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main strategic collaboration and its purpose.

important_text_spans.text: Through this collaboration, Infosys will combine OpenAI's technology with Infosys Topaz Fabric, its purpose-built, composable and open agentic services suite, to help customers move from AI experimentation to practical, responsible deployment and measurable business outcomes.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Announces Strategic Collaboration with OpenAI to Accelerate Enterprise AI Transformation and Unlock AI Value at Scale

important_text_spans.text: The engagement spans high-impact industry and functional opportunities, with an early focus on software engineering, legacy modernization, DevOps automation, e-commerce, and other engineering-led domains.
